## What does this PR do?
A clear summary of the change.

## Why?
What problem does it solve or what improvement does it make?

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Style / design
- [ ] Performance

## Does this align with Kairos's companion-first philosophy?
How does this change serve the user who is searching, grieving, doubting, or growing?

## How was this tested?
- [ ] Tested on desktop (Chrome/Firefox/Safari)
- [ ] Tested on mobile (iOS Safari / Android Chrome)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] No new console errors

## Design System Compliance
- [ ] Uses CSS variables (no hardcoded colors)
- [ ] Spacing uses valid tokens (`--space-1` to `--space-6`, `--space-8`, `--space-10`, `--space-16`, `--space-24`)
- [ ] All interactive elements ≥ 44px touch target
- [ ] Light and dark theme tested

## Changes to Existing Behaviour
List any side effects or things reviewers should pay attention to.

## Checklist
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies added
- [ ] Surgical edit — only changed what was necessary
